message:
chore(release): bump version to 1.0.0

Marks RCH as production-ready with:
- Comprehensive E2E integration tests
- Improved install script with auto-fallback to source build
- Worker selection and health check improvements
- Performance optimizations (zero-alloc hot paths)
- Atomic field accessor tests and memory ordering docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
